title: impatiens inconspicua var. nematostachys
intro: Impatiens inconspicua var. nematostachys is a variety of the Impatiens inconspicua plant, commonly known as the 'small balsam' or 'Chinese balsam', which belongs to the balsam family and is native to the subtropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Impatiens inconspicua var. nematostachys include its use in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Impatiens inconspicua var. nematostachys include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Impatiens inconspicua var. nematostachys include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
